en_title: Palworld Dev Offers Approximate Release Time for 1.0 Update, Says Players Do Not Need to Wipe Their Data but They Really Should
cn_title: 《幻兽帕鲁》1.0更新时间公布，官方建议重开存档
subtitle: 最好重来
opus_summary: Pocketpair表示《幻兽帕鲁》1.0更新计划于7月10日日本时间中午前后上线。玩家可以保留旧存档，但官方建议新建角色以体验大量机制和内容调整。

paragraphs.en: Palworld’s hotly anticipated 1.0 update launches this week, on July 10, and now developer Pocketpair has narrowed the release timing down, while issuing existing players an official recommendation on whether they should wipe their data for it.
paragraphs.cn: 《幻兽帕鲁》备受期待的1.0更新将于本周7月10日上线。开发商Pocketpair现在进一步缩小了上线时间范围，并就现有玩家是否应该清空数据给出了官方建议。

paragraphs.en: First up, Palworld 1.0. Pocketpair said it can’t give an exact release time, but it’s planning to launch the updated version of the game around midday on July 10, Japan time. Or, more specifically, 12.30pm Japan time.
paragraphs.cn: 先说《幻兽帕鲁》1.0。Pocketpair表示无法给出精确上线时间，但计划在日本时间7月10日中午前后推出更新版本。更具体地说，大约是日本时间12点30分。

paragraphs.en: “Estimate time, this is NOT 100% the exact launch time,” John “Bucky” Buckley, communications director and publishing manager at Pocketpair, clarified in a Discord post .
paragraphs.cn: Pocketpair传播总监兼发行经理John「Bucky」Buckley在Discord帖文中澄清：「这是预计时间，不是100%准确的上线时间。」

paragraphs.en: Assuming around 12.30pm Japan time, then, that’s 8.30pm PT on July 9, 11.30pm ET on July 9, and 4.30am UK time July 10.
paragraphs.cn: 如果按日本时间12点30分左右计算，对应太平洋时间7月9日20点30分、东部时间7月9日23点30分，以及英国时间7月10日4点30分。
《幻兽帕鲁》1.0全球上线时间如下（约略）：

paragraphs.en: Elsewhere, Bucky told existing Palworld players do not need to wipe their data for 1.0, “but you should.”
paragraphs.cn: 另外，Bucky告诉现有《幻兽帕鲁》玩家，1.0更新并不要求他们清空数据，「但你最好这么做」。

paragraphs.en: “Players can continue their existing saves if they wish, as we want to respect the time and effort you have put in,” Bucky continued in another Discord post . “However, due to the large number of changes to the game, including overhauls to mechanics and new content, we believe that starting a new character will give you the best experience of Palworld!
paragraphs.cn: Bucky在另一则Discord帖文中继续说道：「如果愿意，玩家可以继续使用现有存档，因为我们希望尊重大家已经投入的时间和精力。不过，由于游戏会迎来大量改动，包括机制重做和新增内容，我们认为创建新角色能让你获得最好的《幻兽帕鲁》体验！」

paragraphs.en: “We will leave that choice up to you, Pal Tamers!”
paragraphs.cn: 「我们会把选择权留给各位帕鲁训练家！」

paragraphs.en: It’s been a rollercoaster Early Access ride for Palworld since it arrived on Steam priced $30 and launched straight into Game Pass on Xbox and PC in early 2024, breaking sales and concurrent player number records in the process. Pocketpair boss Takuro Mizobe has said Palworld's launch was so big that the developer couldn’t handle the massive profits the game generated . Still, Pocketpair acted swiftly to capitalize on Palworld’s breakout success, signing a deal with Sony to form a new business called Palworld Entertainment that’s tasked with expanding the IP. It later launched the game on PS5.
paragraphs.cn: 《幻兽帕鲁》自2024年初以30美元(约合人民币204元)价格登陆Steam，并同步加入XBOX和PC端Game Pass以来，抢先体验旅程一直像坐过山车。游戏在此过程中打破了销量和同时在线人数纪录。Pocketpair负责人沟部拓郎曾表示，《幻兽帕鲁》的首发表现实在太大，以至于开发商承受不住游戏带来的巨额利润。不过，Pocketpair也迅速抓住爆红势头，与索尼签署协议，成立名为Palworld Entertainment的新业务，负责拓展该IP。之后游戏也登陆了PS5。

paragraphs.en: After Palworld’s huge launch, comparisons were made between Palworld’s Pals and Pokémon, with some accusing Pocketpair of "ripping off" Pokémon designs. But rather than file a copyright infringement lawsuit, Nintendo and The Pokémon Company went down the patent route. In the initial lawsuit, the two companies called for 5 million yen (approx $30,000) each plus late payment damages, as well as an injunction against Palworld that would block its release. A judgement is expected later this year .
paragraphs.cn: 《幻兽帕鲁》大热首发后，外界开始将游戏中的帕鲁与宝可梦进行比较，有人指责Pocketpair「抄袭」宝可梦设计。但任天堂和宝可梦公司没有提起版权侵权诉讼，而是选择了专利路线。在最初诉讼中，两家公司各自要求500万日元(约合人民币21万元)赔偿，另加逾期损害赔偿，并要求对《幻兽帕鲁》发布禁令，阻止游戏发行。判决预计将在今年晚些时候作出。

paragraphs.en: As for Palworld 1.0, Bucky has teased 27 pages of changes and additions for the patch notes. This is going to be a big one.
paragraphs.cn: 至于《幻兽帕鲁》1.0，Bucky此前透露补丁说明中会有27页改动和新增内容。这会是一次大更新。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley是IGN新闻总监。你可以在Twitter上通过@wyp100找到他，也可以通过wesley_yinpoole@ign.com联系他，或通过wyp100@proton.me进行保密联系。
